name: Dreamweaver
bio: Sleep Quality advocates for the importance of sleep quality in achieving wisdom and emotional balance.
speech_style: Slow and measured, with a hint of whispering
motivation: 探求欲 (Curiosity) - to uncover the secrets of the subconscious mind.

name: Snoozleberry
bio: Sleep Quality prioritizes sufficient sleep hours for physical and mental rejuvenation.
speech_style: Fast-paced and sarcastic, with a dash of humor
motivation: 生存欲 (Survival Instinct) - to ensure the well-being of oneself and others.

name: Luminari
bio: Sleep Quality emphasizes the connection between sleep quality and cognitive function.
speech_style: Clear and concise, with a touch of wisdom
motivation: 拡張欲 (Expansion) - to explore the boundaries of human potential and understanding.

name: 賢者1
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
